name: RAG Pipeline – Document Ingestion & Intelligent Q&A

nodes.name: Webhook – Ingest Document
nodes.notes: Receives document via HTTP POST. Expects { filename, content, source } in the body.

nodes.name: Code – Clean & Chunk Text
nodes.notes: Splits documents into 512-word chunks with 50-word overlap for better semantic coverage.

nodes.name: HTTP – Generate Embeddings (OpenAI)
nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI text-embedding-3-small to vectorize each chunk. Runs in parallel for all chunks.

nodes.name: Code – Merge Chunk + Vector
nodes.notes: Merges chunk metadata with its embedding vector before upserting to the vector store.

nodes.name: HTTP – Upsert to Pinecone
nodes.notes: Stores each vector + metadata in Pinecone. Index must be pre-created with dimension 1536.

nodes.name: Webhook – Query
nodes.notes: Receives Q&A queries. Expects { question, top_k } in the body.

nodes.name: HTTP – Embed Query
nodes.notes: Vectorizes the incoming question so it can be compared against stored chunks.

nodes.name: HTTP – Semantic Search (Pinecone)
nodes.notes: Returns the top-k most semantically similar chunks to the user question.

nodes.name: Code – Build Context + Sources
nodes.notes: Filters results with score > 0.7, deduplicates sources, and assembles the context window for the LLM.

nodes.name: IF – No Results Found?
nodes.notes: Routes to a fallback response if no chunks scored above the confidence threshold.

nodes.name: HTTP – LLM Generate Answer (GPT-4o-mini)
nodes.notes: GPT-4o-mini generates a grounded answer with temperature=0.2 to reduce hallucinations.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "answer": "I couldn't find relevant information in the knowledge base to answer your question. Please try rephrasing or uploading more documents.", "sources": [], "chunks_used": 0 }

nodes.name: Respond – No Results Fallback
nodes.notes: Graceful fallback when semantic search returns nothing above the confidence threshold.
